response.justification: Bogdan is a skilled full-stack engineer with 20+ years of experience, but this role requires native-level Japanese proficiency—completely absent from his resume—plus specialized expertise in embedded systems security, networking protocols, and Linux kernel development. His recent career (4+ years at Stripe/Shopify) focuses on web and cloud platforms rather than embedded networking. While he has some embedded systems experience (C/C++ at National Instruments 2014-2015, robotics work at Altom), it lacks the depth in security technologies, network layer protocols, and kernel-level programming this role demands.
strengths: 20+ years of professional software development experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded domains
Demonstrated mastery of multiple programming languages and ability to learn new technology stacks rapidly
Strong software engineering practices with emphasis on testing, code quality, and technical mentorship
concerns: Native-level Japanese language proficiency is a stated requirement and is completely absent from the candidate's resume
Current career trajectory is web/cloud-focused; most recent embedded systems work was 8+ years ago
No demonstrated expertise in security protocols, cryptography, authentication systems, or Linux kernel vulnerability analysis

key_factors.factor: No background in security domain or network protocols
Extended gap from embedded systems work; recent roles web/cloud-focused
